mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upload_sessions (upload_uuid, user_id, space_id, parent_resource_id, filename, total_size, total_parts, sha256, status, expires_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{uploadUuid}, #{userId}, #{spaceId}, #{parentResourceId}, #{filename}, #{totalSize}, #{totalParts}, #{sha256}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, #{completedAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, upload_uuid, user_id, space_id, parent_resource_id, filename, total_size, total_parts, sha256, status, expires_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM upload_sessions WHERE upload_uuid = #{uploadUuid} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE upload_sessions SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE upload_sessions SET status = #{status}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
